instruction: Refactor js/components.js to strip inline styles and implement overflow protection within the fixed-height mobile bento grid. In renderBento, update the .bc-stack card to use the new .bc-chip-cat, .bc-chip-cat-title, and .bc-chip-footer classes instead of inline style attributes. Remove the style='gap: 6px;' from .bc-chips-compact. Additionally, add the .desktop-only class to verbose elements to ensure they don't overflow their grid cells on mobile: add it to .bc-tags in .bc-now and to .bc-body (or the items within) in .bc-earlier. Verify .bc-qugo already has it.
